name: Capitania Reit FOF - Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario
summary: Capitania Reit FOF - Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario is a real estate investment fund in Brazil that invests in other real estate funds (a fund-of-funds). The fund aims to generate income and capital appreciation for its investors through diversification across various real estate segments and strategies. It is managed by Capitania Investimentos.
